info.title: Bonsai Admin API
info.description: API documentation for Bonsai Admin API with JWT authentication

offset.description: Starting index for pagination (default: 0)

limit.description: Maximum number of items to return (optional, null for no limit)

orderBy.description: Field(s) to sort by. Use "-" prefix for descending order (e.g., "-createdAt")

filters.description: Dynamic field filters as key-value pairs. Use bracket notation in query string (e.g., filters[projectId]=value, filters[name][op]=like&filters[name][value]=test). Values can be direct values, arrays (for IN), or operation objects

ListParams.description: List query parameters for filtering, sorting, pagination, and search

op.description: Filter operator: eq (equals), ne (not equals), gt (greater than), gte (>=), lt (less than), lte (<=), like (pattern match), in (value in array), nin (not in array), between (range)

value.description: Filter value to compare against. For "in", "nin", and "between" operations, use an array

ListFilterOperation.description: Filter operation with explicit operator and value

model.description: Model name (e.g., gpt-4, gpt-3.5-turbo, gpt-5, o1)

defaultMaxTokens.description: Default maximum output tokens for generation (includes reasoning and output tokens for reasoning models)

defaultTemperature.description: Default temperature for generation (0-2). Not used with reasoning models - use reasoningEffort instead.

defaultTopP.description: Default top-p for generation (0-1). Not used with reasoning models - use reasoningEffort instead.

reasoningEffort.description: Reasoning effort for reasoning models (gpt-5, o-series). Controls how many reasoning tokens to generate. low=fast/economical, high=more complete reasoning. Default: medium. gpt-5.1 defaults to none.

reasoningSummary.description: Generate a summary of reasoning performed by the model. Useful for debugging. Only for reasoning models.

defaultMaxTokens.description: Default maximum tokens for generation (includes thinking tokens when extended thinking is enabled)

defaultTemperature.description: Default temperature for generation (0-1). Not compatible with extended thinking.

defaultTopP.description: Default top-p for generation (0-1). Limited to 0.95-1 when thinking is enabled.

thinkingMode.description: Enable extended thinking. Use "adaptive" for Claude Opus 4.6+, "enabled" for earlier models. Allows Claude to reason internally before responding.

thinkingBudgetTokens.description: Maximum tokens for internal reasoning (min: 1024). Only used with thinkingMode="enabled". Higher budgets enable deeper reasoning but increase latency.

model.description: Model name (e.g., gemini-2.5-flash, gemini-2.5-pro, gemini-3-flash, gemini-3-pro)

defaultMaxTokens.description: Default maximum tokens for generation (includes thinking tokens for thinking models)

thinkingLevel.description: Thinking level for Gemini 3 models. Controls reasoning depth: minimal=chat/high-throughput, low=simple tasks, medium=balanced, high=max reasoning depth.

thinkingBudget.description: Thinking budget (tokens) for Gemini 2.5 models. Set to -1 for dynamic thinking (default), 0 to disable, or specific token count (128-32768). Use thinkingLevel for Gemini 3.

includeThoughts.description: Include thought summaries in response. Provides insight into model's reasoning process for debugging. Available for all thinking models.

model.description: Model ID to use for speech synthesis (e.g., "eleven_flash_v2_5", "eleven_multilingual_v2")

voiceId.description: Voice UUID to use for speech synthesis

audioFormat.description: Preferred audio output format for synthesized speech

noSpeechMarkers.description: Markers to identify sections of text that should not be spoken

removeExclamationMarks.description: Whether to replace exclamation marks with periods

style.description: Style setting for V2+ models (0.0-1.0), defaults to 0

useSpeakerBoost.description: Enable speaker boost for V2+ models, defaults to true

useGlobalPreview.description: Use global preview endpoint for geographic proximity optimization

inactivityTimeout.description: WebSocket inactivity timeout in seconds, defaults to 180

useSentenceSplitter.description: Whether to use sentence splitter for text processing, defaults to true

model.description: Model ID to use for speech synthesis: "gpt-4o-mini-tts" (promptable), "tts-1" (low latency), or "tts-1-hd" (high quality)

voiceId.description: Voice ID to use (alloy, ash, ballad, coral, echo, fable, nova, onyx, sage, shimmer, verse, marin, cedar)

audioFormat.description: Preferred audio output format for synthesized speech

instructions.description: Voice control instructions for gpt-4o-mini-tts model. Controls accent, tone, emotion, speed, whispering, etc. Only supported by gpt-4o-mini-tts model

useSentenceSplitter.description: Whether to use sentence splitter for text processing, defaults to true

audioFormat.description: Preferred audio output format. Streaming supports: linear16, opus, mulaw, alaw. REST-only: mp3, flac, aac

sampleRate.description: Sample rate for audio output in Hz (e.g., 8000, 16000, 24000, 48000). Availability depends on audio format

bitRate.description: Bit rate for audio output (e.g., 32000, 64000, 128000). Applies to certain formats like mp3, opus, aac

container.description: Audio container format. Use "none" for raw audio, "wav" for WAV container, "ogg" for Ogg container

removeExclamationMarks.description: Whether to replace exclamation marks with periods

model.description: Model ID to use for speech synthesis (e.g., "sonic-3", "sonic-3-latest", "sonic-3-2026-01-12"). Defaults to "sonic-3-latest"

voiceId.description: Voice ID to use for speech synthesis (e.g., "f786b574-daa5-4673-aa0c-cbe3e8534c02" for Katie). See Cartesia voice catalog

audioFormat.description: Preferred audio output format for synthesized speech. Defaults to "pcm_24000"

emotion.description: Emotion tags for expressive speech (e.g., ["positivity:high", "curiosity"]). See Cartesia emotion documentation

maxBufferDelayMs.description: Maximum time in milliseconds to buffer text chunks before sending to TTS (0-5000ms). Defaults to 3000ms. Set to 0 to disable buffering

audioFormat.description: Preferred audio output format for synthesized speech. Defaults to "pcm_24000"

rate.description: Speaking rate adjustment (e.g., "+10%", "-5%", "1.2"). Range: 0.5 to 2.0 or percentage

voiceActivityDetection.description: Whether to enable voice activity detection to automatically start/stop recording based on speech presence

language.description: The language code for speech recognition (e.g., 'en-US')

dictionaryPhrases.description: The phrases to add to the speech recognition dictionary

audioFormat.description: Audio input format for speech recognition (e.g., "pcm_16000")

modelId.description: Model ID to use for transcription (e.g., "scribe_v2_realtime"), defaults to scribe_v2_realtime

audioFormat.description: Audio encoding format for speech-to-text, defaults to pcm_16000

languageCode.description: Language code in ISO 639-1 or ISO 639-3 format (e.g., "en", "es")

includeTimestamps.description: Whether to receive word-level timestamps in transcription results, defaults to false

includeLanguageDetection.description: Whether to include detected language code in transcription results, defaults to false

commitStrategy.description: Strategy for committing transcriptions - manual or voice activity detection, defaults to manual

vadSilenceThresholdSecs.description: Silence threshold in seconds for VAD (0.3-3), defaults to 1.5

vadThreshold.description: Threshold for voice activity detection (0.1-0.9), defaults to 0.4

minSpeechDurationMs.description: Minimum speech duration in milliseconds (50-2000), defaults to 100

minSilenceDurationMs.description: Minimum silence duration in milliseconds (50-2000), defaults to 100

enableLogging.description: When false, zero retention mode is used (enterprise only), defaults to true

modelId.description: Model ID to use for transcription (e.g., "nova-3", "nova-2", "base", "enhanced"), defaults to nova-3

audioFormat.description: Audio encoding format for speech-to-text, defaults to pcm_16000

interimResults.description: Enable interim (partial) transcription results during streaming, defaults to false

endpointing.description: Milliseconds of silence to wait before finalizing speech (10+) or false to disable, defaults to 300

smartFormat.description: Apply formatting (punctuation, capitalization, currency, etc.) to improve readability, defaults to true

punctuate.description: Add punctuation and capitalization to transcript, defaults to true

diarize.description: Recognize and label different speakers in the audio, defaults to false

utteranceEndMs.description: Milliseconds to wait before sending UtteranceEnd event (use with interim_results)

vadEvents.description: Send SpeechStarted events when speech is detected, defaults to false

sampleRate.description: Audio sample rate in Hz (8000, 16000, 22050, 24000, 44100), defaults to 16000

formatTurns.description: Enable formatted transcripts with capitalization and punctuation (adds latency, not recommended for voice agents), defaults to false

speechModel.description: Speech model to use: English-only or multilingual (supports English, Spanish, French, German, Italian, Portuguese), defaults to universal-streaming-english

keytermsPrompt.description: List of custom words or phrases to improve recognition accuracy

vadThreshold.description: Voice activity detection confidence threshold (0.0 to 1.0) for classifying audio frames as silence, defaults to 0.4

endOfTurnConfidenceThreshold.description: Confidence threshold (0.0 to 1.0) for determining end of turn, defaults to 0.4

minEndOfTurnSilenceWhenConfident.description: Minimum silence in milliseconds required to detect end of turn when confident, defaults to 400

maxTurnSilence.description: Maximum silence in milliseconds allowed in a turn before triggering end of turn, defaults to 1280

inactivityTimeout.description: Time in seconds of inactivity before session is terminated (5-3600), no timeout if not set

audioFormat.description: Audio input format for speech recognition, defaults to pcm_16000

transcriptionMode.description: Transcription mode: "standard" for faster processing or "enhanced" for higher accuracy, defaults to standard

enablePunctuation.description: Enable automatic punctuation in transcripts, defaults to true

enableFormatting.description: Enable automatic formatting (numbers, dates, currency, etc.), defaults to true

additionalVocab.description: Custom vocabulary words or phrases to improve recognition accuracy

enableDiarization.description: Enable speaker diarization to detect different speakers, defaults to false

maxDelay.description: Maximum delay in seconds for transcription results (0-10), lower values reduce latency

post.description: Authenticates against the stored environment, checks schema compatibility, fetches the remote export bundle, and imports it locally — all server-side. Returns a job immediately with status "pending"; poll GET /api/environments/{id}/migration/jobs/{jobId} for progress.

projectIds.description: Specific project IDs to include. Pulls all child entities (stages, personas, classifiers, etc.) for these projects.

stageIds.description: Specific stage IDs to include. Transitively pulls in the stage's persona, classifiers, context transformers, global actions, and all referenced providers.

personaIds.description: Specific persona IDs to include. Pulls in referenced TTS provider.

classifierIds.description: Specific classifier IDs to include. Pulls in referenced LLM provider.

contextTransformerIds.description: Specific context transformer IDs to include. Pulls in referenced LLM provider.

toolIds.description: Specific tool IDs to include. Pulls in referenced LLM provider.

globalActionIds.description: Specific global action IDs to include.

knowledgeCategoryIds.description: Specific knowledge category IDs to include. All child knowledge items are always included.

providerIds.description: Specific provider IDs to include (in addition to any transitively required ones).

apiKeyIds.description: Specific API key IDs to include.

selection.description: Granular entity selection. Omit or pass {} to pull everything.

force.description: If true, bypass schema hash mismatch check

dryRun.description: If true, simulate the pull without writing to the database

202.description: Pull job started — poll the returned job ID for status

get.description: Returns the current state of an async pull job scoped to this environment. Jobs are held in process memory — a server restart clears all job history.

404.description: Job not found or does not belong to this environment
